title: Mooshroom Energy
body:
# 🍄 Mooshroom Energy & MooshDonalds 

![Mooshroom Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4d951b7e51c55b1c0ebb1b41009a5a9c874a9e9.jpeg)  
*"Fuel your adventures with moo-tastic power!"*  
## 🌟 Introduction  
A survival-focused datapack that transforms underused Minecraft items into powerful consumables. Features **4 energy drinks** and **3 tiered snacks** with unique buffs, all using custom player head textures by [Lyera](https://x.com/LyeraMC) (*no resource pack required*).  

🔗 Compatible with **[Food Balance](https://modrinth.com/datapack/food-balance)** and **[Apple Enchant](https://modrinth.com/datapack/apple-enchant)** for expanded food mechanics!

---

## 🧉 Mooshroom Energy Drinks  
*5-minute duration effects | Crafted with Cocoa Beans + Iron Ingot + Unique Ingredients*  

### 🍀 Classic Mooshroom Energy  
![Classic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a5ad03df48f469d9dcd7a24af7784009d1c311.png)  
**Recipe:**  Honey Bottle + Sea Pickle  
**Effects:**  
- Haste II ⛏️  
- Luck 🍀  

### ❄️ Absolute Zero Edition  
![Absolute Zero](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1587856f9622654183ba5f7ecdc2aea75f7bf92f.png)  
**Recipe:**  Blue Ice + Breeze Rod  
**Effects:**  
- Wind Charged (particle effects) 🌪️  
- Dolphin’s Grace 🐬  
- Fire Resistance 🔥  

### 💖 Pink Edition  
![Pink](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c011ebb9ab180c0c8c363511cd434eb836e4ce34.png)  
**Recipe:**  Beetroot Soup + Sugar  
**Effects:**  
- Regeneration ❤️🩹  

### ⚪ Zero Sugar Edition  
![Zero Sugar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57ae1b7ce992bb04ab9ac3aa71795b7665d90f5.png)  
**Recipe:**  Resin Clump + Water Bottle/Potion  
**Effects:**  
- Night Vision 🌙👁️

---

## 🍴 Mooshroom Snacks  

### 🍔 Big Moosh Burger  
![Big Moosh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe294154849258b35610036380bf449f3a3d04a4.png)  
**Recipe:** Bread + any Grass + any chicken Egg + Cooked Meat  
**Effects:**  
- Saturation 🍗
- Extra Hearts 💝 with a slight chance

### 🍟 MooshDonalds Meal  
![MooshDonalds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a4ba2451d1004948161b318eaf779f1704c6678.png)  
**Recipe:** Cake + Baked Potato + 2x any Cooked Meat  
**Effects:**  
- Max Saturation 🍗🍗
- 2 Shield Hearts 💛💛
- Strength 💪 with a slight chance
- Resistance 🛡️ with a slight chance

### � Grand Big Moosh (Ultimate Tier)  
![Grand Big Moosh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a55f542509c410a3a5232aedebc276823e6b0eb.png)  
**Recipe:** Bread + *Tall Grass* + any rare Egg(sniffer, turtle or dragon) + Enchanted Golden Apple  
**Effects:**  
- Saturation 🍗
- 10 Shield Hearts 💛×10  
- Decaying Resistance 🛡️100%→0%

**Note:** Tall Gras is actually an rare item which is only obtained from chest loot, it deserves more love!

---
## 🔑 Key Features  
![Drinks Collage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2d66b4e62f25bd44f8b7e466c3f0cf467a49be4.jpeg)  
- **Revitalized Items:** Gives purpose to Sea Pickles, Beetroot Soup, Tall Grass, and Breeze Rods  
- **Balanced Tiers:** Combines common (e.g., Sugar) and rare (e.g., Blue Ice) ingredients  
- **Anti-Clutter Mechanic:** Reduces block range when holding items to prevent misplacement  
- **Survival & RP Ready:** Perfect for hardcore worlds or themed servers  

---

## ⚖️ Legal Disclaimer  
*This fan-made datapack is not affiliated with or endorsed by:*  
- Monster Energy® (energy drink brand)  
- McDonald's® (fast-food chain)  

*All assets are original creations inspired by Minecraft’s art style. "Mooshroom Energy" and "MooshDonalds" are fictional names for in-game use only.*  

---
